title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Rustomjee Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Rustomjee Group
jsonLd.description:
Rustomjee Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rustomjee Group:
Rustomjee Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group!
